Plant based active ingredient (also contains synthetic active ingredient). Next page 1 Kills Flying Insects 2 Odour-Free Fast and effective, for immediate results FlyClear Wasp & Fly Killer effectively kills flying insects such as flies, wasps, moths and mosquitoes with immediate effect. This odour-free product quickly deals with flying insects in ways that are kinder to nature. FlyClear Wasp & Fly Killer is made from a plant based active ingredient exclusively developed by the scientists at Evergreen Garden Care and is certified for use in organic systems. Both the bottle and cap are 100% recyclable. Why should I use FlyClear Wasp & Fly Killer? FlyClear Wasp & Fly Killer is an aerosol spray, effective against flying insects such as wasps, flies, moths and mosquitoes in and around premises. It contains chrysanthemum flower extract as an active ingredient. Where can I use FlyClear Wasp & Fly Killer? FlyClear Wasp & Fly Killer can be used indoors and outdoors. When should I use FlyClear Wasp & Fly Killer? FlyClear Wasp & Fly Killer can be used all year round, when flying insects are present. How do I use FlyClear Wasp & Fly Killer? Shake can well before use. Hold the can upright. Point the spray nozzle away from face and press the button. Spray directly at insects for 1 second. Do not exceed 10 seconds in 20m² room. Ventilate room thoroughly before re-entry.
